payload.answer: Current architecture: Brain DB is the source of truth, Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performance model remain open questions.
payload.decision: Store the architectural roles of Brain DB, Cognee, and Slack as current; leave Telegram and model-choice as open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity mapping was provided or required; names are preserved as stated.

payload.intent: Compile durable architecture memory from the chat summary while preserving open questions as unresolved.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Telegram may be added later, but this is undecided.
The cheapest model that still saturates performance has not been determined.

details: Preserved two items as unresolved open questions.

repair_options: If Telegram is adopted later, add it as a new memory intake channel or clarify its role relative to Slack.
If a model is selected later, store the chosen model name and the performance/cost rationale.
